entry.title: My First Post by Using Publii
entry.summary: Hello everyon! My name is Eddie Lv, I Have a blog that called [EddieLv's Blog](https://eddielv.com). I want to test Publii, because I heared it is easy to build and update the blog!
entry.content:
Hello everyon!

My name is Eddie Lv, I Have a blog that called [EddieLv's Blog](https://eddielv.com).

I want to test Publii, because I heared it is easy to build and update the blog!
